title: ecb / research paper / foreign holdings | Research Paper | Geopolitics and foreign holdings of euro area government deb...
summary: This ECB research paper uses granular Securities Holdings Statistics data to examine whether foreign holdings of euro area government debt react to geopolitical factors. The analysis finds that foreign investors hold almost a quarter of both euro area and US government debt, with total foreign holdings concentrated in geopolitically aligned countries while foreign official sector holdings are mainly held by non-aligned countries. Since Russia's invasion of Ukraine, holdings by non-aligned countries (excluding Russia) have declined by 5% relative to pre-invasion levels, though this decline has been contained and impact on euro area bond yields has been very limited.
